comment: CI gate matrix: deterministic scripted runs exercising every pipeline outcome and every metric path. Fixture paths are relative to this file. This is NOT a model eval — it goldens the harness itself.

prompts.comment: empty script => the ScriptedAdapter throws a RAW Error (not AdapterOutputError) on the first generation — the deterministic exercise of per-run crash containment (explicit `error` outcome, matrix continues).

prompts.prompt: a screen that the hosted path rejects before generation

p04-adapter-failure.error: empty model output (scripted generation-then-bad-output case, dspack-gen#19)

p07-pre-generation-reject.error: HTTP 400: The compiled grammar is too large (scripted no-generation case, dspack-gen#19)
